summary: A cinematic, color-graded vertical recruitment spot built like a movie trailer: tight slow-motion close-ups of a BORTAC/U.S. Border Patrol agent's kit, a dramatic night raid with a vehicle on fire, and agents sprinting toward a crowd in an action-film style, capped by a glowing 'CBP.GOV/CAREERS' title card. The tweet 'Run with us.' and the heroic, high-production cinematography make this a clear youth-appeal recruitment-as-trailer piece, even though the metadata flags no audio track.

script.scene: Extreme close-up, shallow-focus and color-graded, of a camo-clad agent's shoulder showing a U.S. BORDER PATROL / BORTAC patch and radio antenna; cinematic teal-and-tan tone.
Dark night street: a silhouetted agent (marked POLICE/HSI vest) runs toward a vehicle engulfed in fire, lens flares and orange glow, dramatic action-film framing.
Daytime arrest scene, handheld energy: an agent in camo restrains a detainee in a hoodie against vehicles, gritty saturated tone.
Wide cinematic shot from behind a sprinting tactical agent (marked vest) running down a street toward a building and a gathered crowd; film-like desaturated grade.
Final title card: glowing backlit silhouette of an agent in haze/smoke with 'CBP.GOV/CAREERS' superimposed across the frame.

notable_text: CBP.GOV/CAREERS; U.S. BORDER PATROL; BORTAC; tweet: 'Run with us.'
